{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321140504DC9A0107DD52CAE1F7F2"}"},"total":1077},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7118368921736495904","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这书虽然短，但是写的还可以，主角从一开始到最后都无敌姿态手工，看的没有乏味。不像有些文章曲曲折折绕地球一圈，整些水剧情让读者看了乏味。作者继续努力，，，"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1657374505,"group_id":"7023981148279671841","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我掀起山河奔向你，踏进星辰来访你。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N872MJBSof6NKUXdl5M6EkE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7e8cd1efe2784d748eea32a2af2d2020~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616543&x-signature=Q%2BZ9vWIBUtPdMSoJE1fhr%2FaLU%2B0%3D","user_id":"783277579841645","user_name":"梦想不灭"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"783277579841645","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7023981148279671841","book_info":{"abstract":"【热血爽文，无敌帝皇】
开局穿越玄幻世界，成为女帝的亲王。
洞房花烛夜，女帝直接丢下他跑去闭关，还让成为监国执掌超纲？
看着内忧外患的皇朝，杨枭逆天开挂觉醒系统，签到各种奖励横推大陆。
当女帝闭关而出，想重新执掌皇朝之时。
谁知杨枭却突然出现，指着眼前统御全大陆的无敌圣朝。
“看，这就是朕为你打下的江山！”
女帝当场就傻眼了。
有没有搞错，只是让你监国而已，你却统一了全大陆？
现在我这个女帝咋整？给你暖被窝生小孩吗？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/692c74628af27f056d3fcf1d69b03664","author":"我会抓小鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7023981148279671841","book_name":"签到一个月，朕竟然统一了全大陆","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4897人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7023982370063647265","read_count":"4897","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"601522"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"238","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,女帝,无敌,无脑爽,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7642da45c4caaa00aa69e994e5652ed4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257104&x-signature=bP6W4rmqxq%2BWfdDK0mzMAAZ71oo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3197019794441543","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.925000
